entities.name: WOMEN'S EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The degree of agency, decision-making power, and autonomy held by women in rural households.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TECHNOLOGY ADOPTION
entities.description: The process of incorporating new agricultural technologies into farming practices to improve productivity.

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: A measure of the variety of foods consumed, used as an indicator of nutritional status and food security.

entities.name: KENYA

entities.name: MULTIPLE TREATMENT ENDOGENOUS SWITCHING REGRESSION
entities.description: A statistical framework used to control for potential endogeneity in the relationship between empowerment, technology adoption, and dietary diversity.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD WELFARE
entities.description: The overall well-being and socio-economic status of individuals and households.
